title: Deal Box
shortDescription: Track deals & discounts from 5,000+ brands across 21 countries!
fullDescription:
Deal Box brings you the best deals, discounts, and offers from over 5,000 brands worldwide -- all in one beautifully designed app.

Stop wasting time hunting for deals across dozens of websites. Deal Box automatically collects and curates the latest campaigns, sales, and special offers from your favorite brands across 21 countries.

What You Get:

● Massive Brand Network
Over 5,000 brands updated daily. From fashion and electronics to groceries, beauty, travel, and finance -- every deal category you can think of.

● 21 Countries Covered
Track deals in the USA, UK, Germany, Turkey, India, Brazil, Indonesia, Russia, Mexico, Japan, Philippines, Thailand, Canada, Australia, France, Italy, Spain, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, South Korea, and Argentina.

● Smart Notifications
Follow your favorite brands and get instant alerts when they launch new deals. Never miss a discount again.

● 13 Categories
Shopping, Electronics, Fashion, Food & Grocery, Dining, Beauty & Personal Care, Home & Living, Sports & Outdoor, Travel & Transport, Finance, Insurance, Automotive, Books & Hobby.

● Brand Following
Build your personalized brand list. We'll notify you the moment they publish a new campaign.

● Favorites List
Save deals you love, track expiration dates, and act before they're gone.

● Advanced Sorting
Sort by highest discount, ending soon, recently added, or popularity.

● Free to Use
All core features are completely free. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited notifications and an ad-free experience.

Smart shopping starts here. Download Deal Box and start saving today!
whatsNew:
